extracted_information: Binoid CBD receives mixed customer reviews. While product quality, effectiveness, and selection are praised, significant concerns exist regarding slow shipping, poor customer service, and order issues. Customers reported delays, incorrect products, and difficulties obtaining refunds. Pricing and shipping times are persistent concerns. Trust and customer service are identified as key areas needing improvement.

report_purchase.details: One-time purchase without hidden or recurring costs for the complete customer feedback analysis report. This specific page displays a limited preview with analysis of 40 recent reviews; the complete version contains all reviews.

features.category: Customer Feedback - Negative Aspects / User Experience Issues
